title: Agenda Block
description: Numbered agenda items with optional discussion, decision, and sub-items. Use `numberingStyle: "section"` (default) for §-prefixed items (meeting minutes), or `numberingStyle: "decimal"` for plain numbered items (1., 2., …) with optional decimal sub-items (1.1., 1.2., …).

numberingStyle.description: Top-level item numbering. `section` renders `§ 1`, `§ 2`, … `decimal` renders `1.`, `2.`, … (and enables `subItems` decimal sub-numbering).

decisionLabel.description: Label for the decision line. Default is Swedish "Beslut:".

subItems.description: Optional flat sub-items rendered with decimal sub-numbering (1.1., 1.2., …). Only meaningful with `numberingStyle: "decimal"`.
